title: n4m method catalog entry v1
description: One method per entry. Drives the build (TUs/headers carry-along), parity (fixtures + tolerance row), benchmark (bench_id), per-binding generation (legacy aliases for slim packages), and docs (publications). Validated by catalog/scripts/validate_catalog.py.

method_id.description: Dotted hierarchy: category.subcategory.operator (e.g. preprocessing.scatter.snv, models.pls.simpls, selection.cars). Sub-segments may start with an underscore to denote internal aggregates pending split (e.g. models.pls._aggregate_v097).

family.description: Coarse grouping for analytics. Often equals category.subcategory.

since_abi.description: First ABI version this method was exported in (semver).

deprecated_in_abi.description: If non-null, ABI version where the method was marked deprecated.

removed_in_abi.description: If non-null, ABI version where the method was removed from the public surface.

abi_symbols.description: All C ABI symbols this method exports. Joined against cpp/abi/expected_symbols_*.txt during release.

tu.description: Translation units (relative paths from repo root) that implement the method. May include partial-match syntax 'file.cpp:n4m_models_pls_simpls_*' for files that contain multiple methods.

headers.description: Public headers needed by callers (relative paths).

carry_along_tu.description: Shared utility TUs the method requires (resolved transitively by build_closure.py). Examples: cpp/src/core/common/linalg.{c,hpp}, common/context.{cpp,hpp}.

fixtures.description: Relative paths to JSON fixtures under parity/fixtures/.

divergence_id.description: If non-null, entry id in parity/divergences.json explaining a known skip or weak-tolerance.

feature_flags.description: CMake feature flags gating this method (e.g. N4M_ENABLE_BLAS, N4M_ENABLE_OPENMP, N4M_HAVE_FITPACK).

vendored_licenses.description: Vendored third-party code license tokens this method ships (FITPACK, PyWavelets-coeffs, IsolationForest, etc.). Reviewed in M14 license audit.

bindings.description: Idiomatic surface per binding. legacy_aliases are used by contract tests in the slim pls4all + future subset packages.

publications.description: Citations for the docs page bibliography.
